ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tourney_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for tournament inquiries */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for team registration */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams registered for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., planned, ongoing, finished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "tourney_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the division belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Premier, Challenger) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "min_team_count" INTEGER /* Minimum number of teams required for the division to be valid */,
  "max_team_count" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the division */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for teams in this division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the round belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., Pool, Knockout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., pool, knockout, round-robin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "tourney_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the team registered for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team (e.g., registered, withdrawn, disqualified) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Division in which the team is participating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the player (e.g., Beginner, Advanced) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the match is played */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather forecast for the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the score belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score value */,
  "set_number" INTEGER /* Number of the set (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Number of the game within the set */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "is_tie_break" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game is a tie-break */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "tourney_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the bracket belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the bracket belongs to */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round the bracket belongs to */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket (e.g., single-elimination, double-elimination) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed number of the team in the bracket */,
  "manual_override" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bracket has been manually overridden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brackets_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brackets_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brackets_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, team captain, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the schedule belongs to */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court the match is scheduled on */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the scheduled match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the scheduled match */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of court surface (e.g., clay, grass, hard) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the court in terms of spectators */,
  "lighting" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the court has lighting for night matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court the weather forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather forecast */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature for the forecasted date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity for the forecasted date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed for the forecasted date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation probability for the forecasted date */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility for the forecasted date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the notification is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the notification is for */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match schedule, match reschedule, weather update) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
